::: {.callout-important .difficulty-easy icon="false"}
### Level 1: Basic Operations

Calculate

| a | b | c | d |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| $\frac{3}{4}$ of 36 | $\frac{1}{3}$ of 24 | $\frac{2}{5}$ of 35 | $\frac{4}{9}$ of 72 |
:::

::: {.callout-tip collapse="true"}
### 🔍 Solutions

a) $(36 \div 4) \times 3 = 27$  
b) $(24 \div 3) \times 1 = 8$  
c) $(35 \div 5) \times 2 = 14$  
d) $(72 \div 9) \times 4 = 32$
:::

::: exercise-meta
[Topic: Fractions of Amounts]{.badge .topic-badge}  
[Skills: Multiplicative Reasoning]{.badge .skill-badge}  

:::
